svg.title: Guest notes view
svg.desc: A dedicated on-screen view for guest-level notes intended for office use only. It is explicitly not a printing source.

g.text: ⚠ Internal only. These notes never appear on confirmations, folios, bills, or any printed output.
Repeat guest — prefers the cabin kept quiet, fireplace laid before
Travelling with friends in Madrona; wants to be seated near them
Asked about a possible upgrade if a Cliff cabin opens — flag
Dietary/allergy details live on the reservation screen, not here.
These notes stay on screen only — printing is handled from the Print menu.
